# TNT v0.0.1 — first signed alpha

First signed, notarized, Sparkle-update-capable build of TNT. This is the M0 acceptance demo packaged for installation by users outside the maintainer's machine.

## What works

- Hold ⌥Space (or tap to toggle) → speak in English, Mandarin, or both → hear a Realtime spoken reply within ~1 s.
- Bilingual (en + zh-Hans) end-to-end with code-switching inside a single Voice Turn.
- Mic capture via `AVAudioEngine` + VoiceProcessingIO (echo cancellation + AGC built in).
- Menu-bar State Lamp transitions `idle → listening → thinking → speaking → idle` across each Voice Turn.
- Interrupt: holding the hotkey mid-reply sends `response.cancel` and starts a new turn.
- First-run consent screen explains every outbound data path before the Mic / Input Monitoring TCC prompts fire.
- BYOK OpenAI key flow with a "Test" call and Keychain persistence; no plaintext on disk.

## Install

```sh
brew tap Derek-X-Wang/tnt
brew install --cask tnt
```

Or download the signed `.dmg` from this Release directly.

## Caveats

- macOS-only. iOS target stub exists but is not built for distribution.
- v0 is single-tenant local — no remote `tnt-server` yet (see ADR-0001).
- No Rewrite, no Worker Agent ingest, no Memory personalization yet — those land in M1 → M3.
